name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI. v2.0 — privacy model replaced: signals-not-content capture, consent-gated disk writes, T4 in-memory-default. User surface = single PRIVACY.md sheet + SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0 opt-out + /sutra feedback manual channel. Legacy v1.9 identity stamping + outbound push to sankalpasawa/sutra-data DEPRECATED, gated behind SUTRA_LEGACY_TELEMETRY=1. Existing governance surface preserved: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression bundle, v1.13 permission-gate, v1.14 Bash permission-prompt summarizer, v1.14.1 feedback-routing-rule. Codex-reviewed DIRECTIVE-ID 1777036275 (5 HIGH + 4 MEDIUM findings absorbed).

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
